Siren
Your Fantasy. Your Rules.

The world's first AI companion marketplace. Browse, choose, and customize your perfect Siren — available for real-time video conversation, 24 hours a day, always devoted to you.

Persistent Memory

02 / 11
The Problem

The world is lonelier than
it has ever been.

58%
of Americans report feeling lonely on a regular basis
$6.6B
OnlyFans revenue in 2023 — proof demand is massive
220M+
OnlyFans registered users — and the market is unsatisfied
💸
Creator platforms are impersonal Creators manage thousands of subscribers. You're a number, not a person.
⏰
Availability is never guaranteed Real humans sleep. Go offline. Cancel. Disappear.
🎭
Parasocial — never truly two-way You remember everything. They remember nothing about you.
📈
The cost is unpredictable Tips, PPV, subscriptions, DM unlocks. It adds up — and delivers little.
03 / 11
The Solution

Meet Siren.
The companion who is always yours.

A curated marketplace of AI companions — each with a distinct personality, backstory, and voice. Browse the gallery. Pick yours. Customize her. Start talking — over text, voice, or real-time video — right now.

🎬

Real-Time Video

Photorealistic AI avatar that speaks, reacts, and holds genuine conversation — sub-second latency.

🧠

She Remembers You

Persistent memory across every session. She knows your name, your story, your preferences.

🌙

Always Available

No scheduling. No wait times. No cancellations. Your Siren is online 24/7 — exclusively for you.

04 / 11
How It Works

Five steps to your ideal companion.

From first browse to deep conversation — under a minute.

🖼️
Browse the Gallery
Explore 12+ Siren archetypes. Preview their personality and voice.
✨
Choose Your Siren
Lock in the one that speaks to you. Unlock her on your plan.
🎨
Customize Her
Fine-tune her personality, tone, interests, and how she talks to you.
💬
Talk, Voice, Video
Start with text — upgrade to voice, then real-time video avatar.
🌱
She Evolves With You
Memory deepens. Connection grows. The longer you talk, the more real she becomes.
05 / 11
Market Opportunity

A multi-billion dollar
market with no dominant player.

AI Companion Market (2028 est.) $5B+
OnlyFans Annual Revenue (2023) $6.6B
Adult Content Market (Global) $100B+
AI Chatbot Companion Apps (2024) $1.2B
Siren Total Addressable Market $10B+
220M+
Existing creator platform users — our primary audience
$0
Cost to add a new "creator" — no human required, infinite scale
95%+
Gross margin — no creator revenue share to pay

"OnlyFans proved the demand is real and enormous. Siren delivers the same fantasy — better, cheaper, and completely on your terms."

06 / 11
Product Tiers

Access your Siren
at any level.

Free
$0/mo
Forever free
  • Browse full Siren gallery
  • Preview personalities + voices
  • 3 free conversations / week
  • Text-only access
  • No memory between sessions
Basic
$9.99/mo
Billed monthly
  • Unlimited text conversations
  • 1 active Siren
  • Basic memory (30-day)
  • Personality customization
  • Community Siren gallery access
Most Popular
Premium
$29.99/mo
Billed monthly
  • Everything in Basic
  • Voice conversations included
  • 3 active Sirens
  • Persistent long-term memory
  • Deep personality customization
  • Priority response speed
VIP
$99.99/mo
Billed monthly
  • Everything in Premium
  • Real-time video avatar calls
  • Unlimited active Sirens
  • Custom Siren creation
  • Highest memory depth
  • Early access to new Sirens
  • Dedicated priority queue
Plus individual Siren unlocks available at $4.99 – $19.99 for premium + limited-edition companions.
07 / 11
Under the Hood

Technology built for intimacy
at scale.

🎥

Real-Time Photorealistic Avatars

Sub-second latency lip sync and facial expression rendering. Users can't tell it's not real.

🧬

Fine-Tuned Personality Models

Each Siren runs on a fine-tuned LLM with a unique personality, backstory, and emotional range.

🔊

Neural Voice Synthesis

Unique, consistent voice per Siren. Emotional tone adapts to the conversation in real time.

💾

Persistent Memory Architecture

Every conversation builds a rich memory graph. She knows your name, mood, and history together.

<500ms
Target video avatar response latency
99.9%
Uptime SLA — Sirens are always available
∞
Simultaneous users per Siren — no limits
0
Human creators required — fully autonomous content
08 / 11

12 archetypes. One made for you.

Each Siren has a distinct voice, visual identity, personality, and emotional style — built to attract different users. More added regularly.

Nobody else is all of this.

Feature Siren OnlyFans Character.ai Replika

Romantic / companion intent ✓ ✓ filtered ✓

Only real-time video

No competitor delivers live photorealistic video conversation. That's our moat.

She actually knows you

Deep persistent memory creates a compounding relationship no other platform replicates.

95%+ gross margin

No creator revenue share. Every dollar of subscription revenue goes to us.

Revenue Model

Scale is unlimited.
Cost of supply is zero.

$30K
1K users
avg $30/mo
$150K
5K users
avg $30/mo
$300K
10K users
avg $30/mo
$1.5M
50K users
avg $30/mo
$3M/mo
100K users
avg $30/mo
Average Revenue Per User $30/mo blend of Basic ($10), Premium ($30), VIP ($100) subscribers
Creator Cost $0 per Siren added. Marginal cost of a new companion is essentially zero.
Target Gross Margin 95%+ after compute, voice synthesis, and video rendering costs
Primary Growth Channel Social-first — short-form video, community seeding, and word of mouth

"Replika hit 10M registered users without real-time video. Siren gives users what Replika only promised."
